ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "user_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment derived from user text (Positive, Neutral, Negative) */,
  "review_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment derived from review text analysis (Positive, Neutral, Negative) */,
  "polarity_score" REAL /* Polarity score calculated from the review text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Brief title or summary of the review */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* URLs or paths to images uploaded with the review */,
  "review_video" TEXT /* URL or path to a video uploaded with the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app, third-party platform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, home goods) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the product */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs to product images */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a product video */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted by the user */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user across all reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Composite sentiment score derived from various models */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label indicating the overall sentiment (Positive, Neutral, Negative) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_keywords" TEXT /* Key words or phrases that influenced the sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product for which metrics are being collected */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the product based on reviews */,
  "positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Count of positive reviews for the product */,
  "negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Count of negative reviews for the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total count of reviews for the product */,
  "neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Count of neutral reviews for the product */,
  "average_sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score for the product */,
  "most_common_keywords" TEXT /* Most common keywords in the reviews */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sentiment over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_metrics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the feedback */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the feedback (Positive, Neutral, Negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spam_filters" (
  "spam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spam entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review flagged as spam */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review is considered spam */,
  "flagged_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was flagged */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review as spam */,
  "flagged_by" TEXT /* User who flagged the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_filters_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated with the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the user segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the user segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segment_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segment_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segment_mapping_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES user_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the review (1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
